_comment: Per-researcher profile details, keyed by slug (lowercase, dashes). Photo refs (wiki/gh/photo) live on data/transfers.json; this file holds bio/details/links. Keep factual; null when unsure.

john-jumper.name: John Jumper
john-jumper.education: PhD, Theoretical Chemistry, University of Chicago
john-jumper.bio: John Jumper led the development of AlphaFold, DeepMind's protein-structure-prediction system, and shared the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for it. In 2026 he left Google DeepMind for Anthropic.

andrej-karpathy.name: Andrej Karpathy
andrej-karpathy.bio: Andrej Karpathy was a founding member of OpenAI and former Director of AI at Tesla, where he led the Autopilot vision team. A prolific educator, he is one of the most-followed figures in AI.

jan-leike.name: Jan Leike
jan-leike.education: PhD, Machine Learning, Australian National University
jan-leike.bio: Jan Leike co-led OpenAI's Superalignment team and previously researched at DeepMind. He left OpenAI in 2024 over disagreements about safety priorities and joined Anthropic to continue alignment research.

andrew-tulloch.name: Andrew Tulloch
andrew-tulloch.bio: Andrew Tulloch spent over a decade at Meta/Facebook building PyTorch and ML infrastructure, then contributed to OpenAI's models. He co-founded Thinking Machines Lab in 2025 before joining Meta's superintelligence effort.

barret-zoph.name: Barret Zoph
barret-zoph.bio: Barret Zoph is known for neural architecture search at Google Brain and later served as VP of research / post-training at OpenAI. He co-founded Thinking Machines Lab before returning to OpenAI.

luke-metz.name: Luke Metz
luke-metz.bio: Luke Metz worked on learned optimizers and meta-learning at Google Brain and on ChatGPT at OpenAI. He joined Thinking Machines Lab before returning to OpenAI.

sam-schoenholz.name: Sam Schoenholz
sam-schoenholz.bio: Sam Schoenholz is a researcher with a physics background known for deep-learning theory and infinite-width networks at Google Brain. He joined Thinking Machines Lab before moving to OpenAI.

devendra-chaplot.name: Devendra Chaplot
devendra-chaplot.education: PhD, Carnegie Mellon University; B.Tech, IIT Bombay
devendra-chaplot.bio: Devendra Chaplot was a founding member of Mistral AI after a PhD at Carnegie Mellon on embodied and navigation agents. He joined Thinking Machines Lab and then xAI.

ross-nordeen.name: Ross Nordeen
ross-nordeen.bio: Ross Nordeen was a co-founding member of xAI, working on infrastructure and engineering. In 2026 he became the last of xAI's founding cohort to depart, joining Anthropic.
